## Risk level

- [ ] SAFE (reversible, no anti-cheat impact, no system stability risk)
- [ ] MEDIUM (reversible, may affect non-critical Windows features)
- [ ] HIGH (requires user acknowledgment, may conflict with anti-cheats, may reduce security)
